scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green --kill-others "cd client && npm run dev:web:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green --kill-others "cd client && npm run dev:electron:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:plugins:soft && cd server/v1 && go run .
